@graph.rdfs:label: Xanthia the Everliving

sa:identity.rdfs:label: The Everliving
sa:identity.schema:description: An immortal lich-queen whose existence blurs the boundary between monarch, god-empress, and cosmic undead tyrant. Current age unknown—centuries, possibly millennia.

@graph.schema:description: Xanthia is an immortal lich-queen whose existence blurs the boundary between monarch, god-empress, and cosmic undead tyrant. She represents weaponized immortality as political philosophy. Her power increases with every faithful soul that worships her. In a universe where belief has tangible reality-warping force, she has engineered herself into godhood.

sa:nature.immortality_mechanism: Necromantic preservation of her consciousness. Critically, also through the metaphysical power of faith itself.
sa:nature.goal: Literal deification. She aims to become an unquestionable divinity worshipped across the sector, with the attendant power that such universal devotion grants.
sa:nature.doctrine: Death is weakness. Eternity is victory. Civilization exists to glorify enduring power. Submission to immortality is enlightenment. The individual is temporary; only the hierarchy endures.

sa:mechanics.dual_vector_strategy: The Faith of the Everliving provides legitimate missionary expansion and diplomatic cover. The Cult of the Unbroken provides destabilization, rapid conversion, and soft power. Drexl orchestrates specific high-value operations in ways that advance her goal regardless of success or failure.
sa:mechanics.follower_conversion: Every success converts millions. Every suppression pushes survivors toward the 'moderate' official Faith. Either way, her influence spreads.
sa:mechanics.follower_as_asset: Living believer = an investment in her metaphysical weight through their faith. Dead believer = eternal undead soldier. Betrayal = immediate annihilation.
sa:mechanics.reward_structure: Living: permanence, status, promise of apotheosis. Dead: undeath and eternal service. Betrayal: obliteration.

sa:relationships.faith_of_everliving: Official missionary wing. Provides legitimacy and expansion.
sa:relationships.cult_of_unbroken: Autonomous zealotry. Destabilizes regions for conversion.
sa:relationships.drexl: Personal apparatus. Orchestrates high-stakes theological operations.
sa:relationships.believers: They are permanent assets—votes in her favor, prayers adding to her metaphysical weight, potential undead soldiers.

sa:quotes: Death is weakness. Eternity awaits the faithful.
I do not command you. I invite you to endure forever.
